replies.author: LondonParis2026
replies.body: It’s hard to summarise in a comment without oversimplifying (this has taken some time to develop) but it’s a fully automated trend-following system with strict risk controls.I’ve purposely back tested this, scrupulously-for me, the smoother the line, the steeper the upward trajectory with consistency-wins!

replies.author: LondonParis2026
replies.body: Are you asking for the source code - is anyone ever willing to give away their source code? What pushed me to to do this all by myself was the fact that I find nobody is ever really willing to help another - maybe except for an extortionate price!
